mapper.sql: id, username, gender, password, email, nickname, avatar, bio, role_id, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `user` WHERE invite_code = #{inviteCode} AND status = 1

WITH RECURSIVE invite_tree AS ( SELECT r.invitee_id AS id, 1 AS level FROM invite_relation r WHERE r.inviter_id = #{parentId} UNION ALL SELECT r2.invitee_id AS id, it.level + 1 FROM invite_relation r2 JOIN invite_tree it ON r2.inviter_id = it.id ) SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, it.level FROM invite_tree it JOIN `user` u ON u.id = it.id ORDER BY it.level, u.id;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (username, gender, password, email, nickname, avatar, bio, role_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{gender}, #{password}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{bio}, #{roleId}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
